title: In Your World
description: You are a player who has created his world but something is wrong, someone else inhabits it before you.
body:
**𝐈𝐍 𝐘𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐋𝐃**
============================
_**You are a player who has created his world but something is wrong, someone else inhabits it before you.**_

**Imagine you are in Minecraft Alpha or Beta. You are calm in your world, and suddenly you hear sounds, footsteps, you see strange things in the sky without meaning......strange structures floating.....you feel watched.....you hear footsteps... ..but nothing happens....yet...**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/b5SoywqXA94" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe> 

## What's new with this mod?

This is a horror mod focused on the player exploring the environment, they are not random scares or creatures chasing you like typical Dwellers. This mod wants to focus on giving the feeling that the old versions of Minecraft gave. Without bothering the player but giving them the feeling that something is not right. The player has the decision whether to advance or not. It is an environmental and psychological mod with surprises that the player will have to experience. The events are completely random and configurable to the player's taste.

## What is recommended to play this mod and have a good experience?

- I recommend having textures and sounds from Minecraft Alpha or Beta. 
- Do not have too intrusive mods that affect the generation of structures or biomes (this mod uses vanilla biomes).
- Have classic mods like Herobrine to give more tension and atmosphere. 
- Play it in singleplayer.
- Play it patiently and explore. 
- If you are not comfortable with the default configuration, you can change it to your liking and reset it whenever you want. 
- It is compatible with multiplayer servers (tested by the community itself in previous versions) and there are almost no bugs or errors that can happen with the mod.

_**I also recommend installing the following mods:**_

[Click here for Download Geckolib Mod (for animations, etc)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)

[Click here for Download Configured Mod (for the mod config menu)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)

You can uninstall it whenever you want, it will not corrupt or affect your world. If you have problems or doubts, suggestions, you can contact me through the Discord server:

**[https://discord.gg/ZrgMwfdwZB](https://discord.gg/ZrgMwfdwZB)**
